creator: dima@Chg.RU
text:
1)In the port x11-wm/afterstep-stable variable DISTNAME needs to be changed
from AfterStep-1.6.0.tar.gz to AfterStep-1.6.6.tar.gz. This is the latest
stable release. Moreover, file AfterStep-1.6.0.tar.gz doesn't exist there.

2) If it is possible, change MAINTAINER field in the Makefile to dima@chg.ru,
I will do all updates to this port.
